chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women

text: 4371 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَا رَأَيْتُ ضَعِيفَاتِ اَلدِّينِ نَاقِصَاتِ اَلْعُقُولِ أَسْلَبَ لِذِي لُبٍّ مِنْكُنَّ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4371 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"I have not seen those who are weak in faith and deficient in intellect more capable of overwhelming a man of reason than you (women)."
